data.body:
Goal:
Replace the ~3000-line `foolery setup` bash wizard with a thin launcher command that hands the `foolery-configure` skill to whichever agent CLI is on PATH. Since we already shipped `foolery config schema`, `foolery config validate`, and `.claude/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md`, the wizard is redundant.

The user has explicitly authorized breaking backward compatibility with old launchers: "don't worry about backwards compat or old launchers. the UI still works." The settings UI at `src/components/settings-sheet.tsx` is the fallback for anyone on the old launcher.

Delete (remove from repo entirely):
- `scripts/setup.sh`
- `scripts/agent-wizard.sh`
- `scripts/dispatch-pools.sh`
- `scripts/model-picker.sh`
- `scripts/toml-reader.sh`
- Any wizard-specific test scripts: `scripts/test-setup-scan-unmounted.sh`, `scripts/test-install-copilot-setup.sh`, `scripts/test-model-picker.sh`, `scripts/test-model-picker-integration.sh` (audit each before deletion ŌĆö keep anything that tests the UI, not the wizard).
- Any orphan `package.json` scripts that only invoke deleted shells (e.g. `test:smoke:copilot:install`).

Rewrite `setup_cmd` inside the launcher template at `scripts/install.sh`:
- Detect the first agent CLI on PATH in preference order: `claude`, `codex`, `opencode`, `gemini`, `copilot`. Honor a `FOOLERY_SETUP_AGENT` env var override if set.
- Hand the skill body at `$APP_DIR/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md` to that CLI. Exact invocation varies per agent ŌĆö check each CLI's `--help` for the appropriate flag (e.g. `claude`, `codex exec`, `opencode run`, `gemini -p`, `copilot -p`). If an invocation is unclear, print an instruction line telling the user how to manually pipe the skill.
- Bail out with a clear message if no agent CLI is found on PATH, pointing the user at the UI as a fallback (`foolery start && foolery open`).
- Delete the remote `setup.sh` download block and the `SETUP_URL` env var wiring.

Ship the skill with the runtime:
- In `scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh`, copy `.claude/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md` into `$RUNTIME_DIR/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md` so the installed launcher can find it.

Docs:
- `docs/SETTINGS.md` mentions "foolery setup" anywhere ŌĆö update the phrasing to reflect the new flow.
- `README.md` and any other doc that points at the wizard ŌĆö update or delete the pointer.

Verification:
1. `bun run lint` exits 0.
2. `bunx tsc --noEmit` exits 0.
3. `bun run test` exits 0.
4. `bun run build` exits 0.
5. `bash scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh` produces a tarball whose `foolery-runtime/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md` contents match the source skill byte-for-byte.
6. `bash -n scripts/install.sh` passes.
7. After `foolery update` would install the new launcher, running `foolery setup` would hand the skill to `claude` (if on PATH) and the skill would start its discovery flow. Verified by stubbing `claude` in a test and asserting the launcher exec'd it with the SKILL.md path.
8. `grep -rn "setup.sh\|agent-wizard\|dispatch-pools\|model-picker\|toml-reader" --include="*.ts" --include="*.sh" --include="*.md"` returns only historical references (changelog, git history) ŌĆö no live code references.

Constraints:
- Max 500 LOC/file, max 100 LOC/function, max 100 cols/line.
- `setup_cmd` must fail loudly if no agent CLI is found ŌĆö never silently fall through to "open the UI".
- Do NOT touch `src/components/settings-sheet.tsx` (the UI fallback).
- Do NOT touch `src/bin/foolery-config.ts`, `src/lib/schemas.ts`, `.claude/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md`, or `src/lib/doctor-checks-settings-validate.ts` ŌĆö those shipped in prior knots.
data.title: Retire foolery setup wizard: delete scripts and route setup to the foolery-configure skill
